case_title: KATHLEEN POTEAT ET AL VS. TURK AND LEAVENWORTH LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POTEAT, KATHLEEN AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO PHILLIP POTEAT POTEAT, KHRISTY EXECUTRIX OF THE ESTATE OF JOHN POTEAT AS TO DEFENDANT TURK AND LEAVENWORTH LLC BOOPIE LLC DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT , TITLE, ESTATE, LEAN, OR INTREST IN THE PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THE COMPLAINT SUBORDINATE TO PLAINTIFF'S INTEREST SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-24-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-23-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-01-2018
